title: episcia cupreata
intro: Episcia cupreata is a species of episcia, a type of flowering plant native to the tropical rainforests of Central and South America. It is also known as the 'Copper Episcia' due to its copper-colored leaves. The medicinal properties of Episcia cupreata include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of the plant include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, and it can be prepared as a herbal tea or tincture for these purposes.
